title: Italian Vineyards
description: Modpack italiana: contiene mod quali produzione di vino (dalla semina al prodotto finale + altri frutti), veicoli quali trattori, macchine e aerei a  vecchio stile, forniture per l'arredamento esterno e interno di vario genere, nuovi cibi, ecc...
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/hJqOefWZxCk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Italian Modpack: contains mods such as wine production (from sowing to the final product + other fruits), vehicles such as old-fashioned tractors, cars and planes, outdoor and interior furniture supplies of various kinds, new foods, etc...
This modpack adds mods with new blocks, supplies, items, weapons, vehicles, foods, achievements, and crafting. 
In addition, there are mods in the modpack to optimize performance as it works with the client fabric.
